title: Apple iPad 11-inch A16 128GB Wi-Fi $495 @ JB Hi-Fi
body:
Deal: Apple iPad 11-inch A16 128GB Wi-Fi $495 @ JB Hi-Fi

[hamza23] $494 @ TGG which means you can price beat at Officeworks ($469.30).
[Kamppinator] https://www.ozbargain.com.au/node/965265
Don't forget 8% off gift card that works at either officeworks or JB
[ce5himm] what is that apple increase everything ?
[fraxinus] Apple already increased the price to $749 on their website (50% increase!!!!)
That’s ‘only’ a 25% increase on the previous RRP of $599 but still too much for a model that’s supposedly about to be superseded.
[dosada] Apple really think that they can crap all over their users. Not a single company besides them had to go that extreme. Especially on already overpriced items.
[BlueGlowOne] Some Bluetooth keyboard + touchpad case accessories to match:
https://www.amazon.com.au/dp/B0G8DNRCXB
https://www.amazon.com.au/ESR-Keyboard-Detachable-Landscape-…
[Eclipse54] For those wanting to use the newer Apple Intelligence features (which are much better in the newer betas), be weary that this model doesn't support Apple Intelligence at all. Something to keep in mind if you plan on getting one to future proof yourself over the next x number of years.
[Wiadro] meh wait till prime day
[Prime] Apple iPad 11" A16 Wi-Fi 128GB $449 Delivered @ Amazon AU
